method: exact dot-product over committed doc embeddings
note: SP-1 gold-inclusive rebuild: the index now holds a 1M-passage subset containing 100% of dev qrels gold passages (up from a 500K subset with only 2% coverage), so all 6,980 dev queries are answerable and naive == answerable-only recall. Recall is over 1M candidates. Prior (500K/2%-coverage) run measured 0.105 R@10 / 0.321 R@100 on the 146 answerable queries and 0.0064 naive all-query R@100. Reproduce: python scripts/eval_recall.py
